stories.title: Spurs Lock Down Champion Knicks 70-49 — Carter Bryant 19 Pts in Vegas Day 4

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The defending champs got locked up.

Spurs 70, Knicks 49.

Knicks shot 26.5% from the field. Carter Bryant had 19 for San Antonio. Summer League Day 4 had a statement.

#Spurs #Knicks #NBASummerLeague

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Carter Bryant: 19 points.
Knicks: 26.5% shooting.
Final: Spurs 70, Knicks 49.

San Antonio's defense in Summer League looked like a playoff rotation. The defending champs never got comfortable.

#Spurs #NBASummerLeague

article.headline: Spurs Lock Down Defending Champion Knicks 70-49 — Carter Bryant Stars in Vegas Defensive Clinic

stories.title: LeBron James Free Agency Update — Rich Paul Says Decision Not Coming Soon

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Rich Paul on LeBron's decision: "I don't think this happens anytime soon."

Cavs are the frontrunners. Warriors and Sixers each at around 15%. But there's no announcement coming in the next few days.

LeBron is taking his time. #NBA

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Rich Paul has spoken to 27 teams about LeBron James.

27.

He says this is the first time LeBron is making a decision completely pressure-free — "strictly for his happiness."

Cavs lead at ~40%. No timeline. #NBA #LeBronJames

article.headline: Rich Paul Says LeBron Decision Not Coming 'Anytime Soon' — Cavaliers Remain Frontrunners at 40%

stories.title: Summer League Day 4 Roundup — Broome 23/11 in OT Win, Magic Top Heat, Pelicans Edge Hornets

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Summer League Day 4 results:

76ers 100, Pacers 93 (OT) — Johni Broome: 23 pts, 11 reb
Magic 93, Heat 88
Pelicans 95, Hornets 91 — Dickinson: 21 pts
Nuggets beat Wolves — KJ Simpson: 19 pts
Hawks beat Nets

#NBASummerLeague

stories.title: Kawhi Leonard Trade Frozen — NBA Investigation Leaves Raptors in Limbo

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
The Kawhi Leonard trade to Toronto is still frozen.

The NBA's investigation into the Clippers' alleged payments to Kawhi hasn't wrapped up. Commissioner Silver: "I think we need to wrap this up because you need finality."

No timeline yet. #NBA

article.headline: Kawhi Leonard Trade Still Frozen — Commissioner Silver Calls for Finality as Clippers Investigation Drags On

stories.title: KAT Extension Stalled — Knicks Face Second Apron Pressure in Champions Negotiations

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
The defending champion Knicks have a problem.

KAT is eligible for 4 years, $272M. But the second apron rules limit what New York can do. Josh Hart is also extension-eligible.

Brunson took $113M less. Does KAT follow? #Knicks #NBA

article.headline: KAT Extension Talks Stalled — Defending Champion Knicks Face Brutal Second Apron Math
